option.value:
## .NET / C# bin/ obj/ *.user *.suo *.userosscache *.sln.docstates *.vs/
## Rider / JetBrains .idea/ *.DotSettings.user
## VS Code .vscode/
## Build results [Dd]ebug/ [Rr]elease/ x64/ x86/ [Aa][Rr][Mm]/ [Aa][Rr][Mm]64/ bld/ [Bb]in/ [Oo]bj/ [Ll]og/ [Ll]ogs/
## NuGet *.nupkg *.snupkg project.lock.json project.fragment.lock.json artifacts/ packages/ !**/packages/build/
## ASP.NET appsettings.Development.json
## Archivos de publicación **/publish/ **/PublishProfiles/
## Archivos de sistema Thumbs.db ehthumbs.db Desktop.ini .DS_Store
## Certificados y secretos *.pfx *.key *.pem secrets.json
